name: speech-to-md
description: Local speech-audio-to-Markdown transcript bundle skill with timestamped evidence and explicit ASR runtime boundaries.

interface.shortDescription: Transcribe trusted local speech audio to Markdown bundles.
interface.longDescription: Distributes the public speech-to-md skill for Codex. It packages trusted local speech recordings or existing transcripts into LLM-readable Markdown bundles with timestamped segments, manifest metadata, audit notes, and explicit local ASR runtime boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use Speech To Md to transcribe this local audio file.
Create a Markdown transcript bundle for this lecture recording.
Package this transcript for LLM analysis with audio audit notes.
